---
title: "Publications"
editor: visual
---

## Journal Papers

**Jianxiang Tan**, & **Yanto Chandra** (2026). Governing Military Artificial Intelligence Technologies: Manufacturing War or Peace with Artificial Intelligence. *Chinese Political Science Review*.

**Jianxiang Tan**, & **Yanto Chandra** (2025). AI as a framework for public service innovation. *Public Money & Management*. Advance online publication. <https://doi.org/10.1080/09540962.2025.2505206>

## Book Chapter

Yanto Chandra, Yiyun Luo., & **Jianxiang Tan.**2025. "Trust Me, I am Almost a Doctor: Uncertainty in Artificial Intelligence Mediated Doctor-Patient Interactions." In Artificial Intelligence and the Future of Human Relations – Eastern and Western Perspectives. Nature Springer. [Link](https://link.springer.com/book/10.1007/978-981-96-7185-4)
